title: Refresh Carl Bauer (CFO) + Northwind ahead of June 30 close
description: Meridian Foods primary opp ($187k) closes June 30 and the economic buyer Carl Bauer (CFO, ex-PwC, finance background) has never been on a live call — he's the critical path. Enrich his current priorities/public signals and refresh Northwind's competitive positioning so the AE can re-engage with a sharp 3-yr TCO + EU-residency angle. Deadline-sensitive: needed within 3-4 days.
